tracer_slice.verb: Operator runs `/design-explore` on this doc → sees `## Design Expansion` block appended with `### Core Prototype` + `### Iteration Roadmap` + `### Architecture Decision` + 6 supporting subsections. Real `/design-explore` skill, real MCP write (DEC-A22 via `arch_decision_write`), real persist mutation (this Edit call).

DB columns `tracer_slice_block` + `visibility_delta` on `ia_stages` not yet migrated
